error: Host compilation failed because TilingContext shape access used GetInputShape (StorageShape/Shape mismatch) and the generated tiling struct accessor get_cubeTilingData() did not exist. Later runtime tiling also showed the original aggressive split strategy was unsafe.
summary: When host-side Matmul tiling code is generated for custom ops, use context->GetInputTensor(...)->GetOriginShape() instead of GetInputShape(), access macro-generated tiling members directly (for example cubeTilingData), and start with conservative bias-enabled tiling parameters such as EnableBias(true), SetFixSplit(16,16,-1), and SetDim(1) before adding multicore offsets.
